overall.description: Stationary first-person view from a waterfront promenade in a futuristic cyberpunk city during a rainy dusk. The camera overlooks a neon-lit skyline across choppy waters, with rain droplets streaking across the lens. A flying vehicle briefly traverses the sky mid-clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking neon city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing still on a waterfront promenade, watching rain fall on the dark water and observing the illuminated city skyline across the bay

notable_agents.action: flying car traverses the sky from right to left above the distant skyscrapers around the 36-second mark

entered.detail: dark metal safety railing running horizontally across the foreground, separating the walkway from the water
choppy dark water with white foam crests reflecting the city lights
dense cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers with various colored neon lights and glowing windows
bright cyan neon sign with 'softsys' text mounted on a building facade
large building with a prominent dome roof and multiple illuminated levels
rain droplets streaking diagonally across the camera lens and falling through the air

segments.scene_description: A static view from a waterfront promenade during a rainy dusk in a cyberpunk metropolis. The camera faces a neon-lit city skyline across dark choppy waters, with a metal railing in the foreground. Rain streaks continuously across the lens while a flying vehicle briefly crosses the sky above the skyscrapers. The scene maintains a moody, atmospheric ambiance with cool blue and cyan tones dominating the city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a waterfront promenade, capturing a moody, rain-soaked dusk in a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a view across dark, choppy waters toward a distant skyline dominated by cool blue and cyan neon lights. As rain streaks continuously across the lens, the atmospheric tension builds against the backdrop of the towering skyscrapers and a foreground metal railing. The scene then shifts slightly in focus as a single flying vehicle traverses the sky, cutting through the hazy air above the city. Finally, the camera lingers on the shimmering reflections of the neon cityscape dancing upon the restless surface of the water.
